action: P1 fix: CSP/API URL + fallback array
details: Fixed P1 CSP bug per Board and QA inbox directives. (1) Changed frontend API variable from cross-origin http://hostname:3001/api to relative '/api'. (2) Updated fallback game array from 3 to all 5 games (added Tetris + Space Invaders). (3) Added nginx reverse proxy: location /api/ -> backend:3001/api/. (4) Added connect-src 'self' to CSP header. Rebuilt containers, verified /api/games returns all 5 games, verified all 5 game cards render in browser.
